---
title: "More to Explore"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        header#title-block-header {
          display: none !important;
        }
        </style>
---

## Nice, Nice, Very Nice: Additional Stuff, References, Links, and Whatever Else Belongs Here

### Good uses of statistics and public-health data

-   [Florence Nightingale and the rise of statistical thinking in nursing](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7660360/)
-   [John Snow — Britannica biography](https://www.britannica.com/biography/John-Snow-British-physician)
-   [Broad Street pump outbreak — Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/topic/Broad-Street-pump-cholera-outbreak-of-1854)

### Dark history of statistics, measurement, and classification

-   [Francis Galton — Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Francis-Galton)
-   [Karl Pearson — Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Karl-Pearson)
-   [Ronald Aylmer Fisher — Britannica](https://www.britannica.com/biography/Ronald-Aylmer-Fisher)
-   [Fisher and eugenics](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC8115641/)
-   [Annals of Eugenics history](https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3077531/)

### Eugenics, scientific racism, and Nazi racial hygiene

-   [USHMM: Eugenics](https://encyclopedia.ushmm.org/content/en/article/eugenics)
-   [USHMM: The Biological State — Nazi Racial Hygiene, 1933–1939](https://encyclopedia.ushmm.org/content/en/article/the-biological-state-nazi-racial-hygiene-1933-1939)
-   [USHMM: Forced Sterilization](https://encyclopedia.ushmm.org/content/en/article/forced-sterilization-a-form-of-nazi-persecution)
-   [USHMM: Deadly Medicine — Creating the Master Race](https://encyclopedia.ushmm.org/content/en/article/deadly-medicine-creating-the-master-race)

### When causal overreach causes harm

-   [BMJ: How the case against the MMR vaccine was fixed](https://www.bmj.com/content/342/bmj.c5347)
-   [BMJ editorial on the Wakefield paper](https://www.bmj.com/content/342/bmj.c7452)
-   [The original 1998 Lancet paper, for context](https://www.thelancet.com/pdfs/journals/lancet/PIIS0140-6736%2897%2911096-0.pdf)

### Risk communication and interpretation

-   Relative vs absolute risk explainers
-   Good denominator-aware reporting examples
-   Bad denominator-free reporting examples
-   Good uncertainty communication examples
-   Examples where “significant” was treated as “important”

### Visuals, tools, and extras

-   Outside figures you might want later
-   Applets, dashboards, videos, and demos
-   Optional extensions for readers who want more
-   Figures you may steal from yourself later for slides or teaching

###
